name: 真相大白——反派自食惡果
description: Richard發現Ruth自己吃了墮胎藥卻嫁禍Michelle，三年的冤屈終於洗清。白蓮花的真面目被揭穿，觀眾積壓的憤怒得到釋放。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: I know that Michelle didn't kill your baby. I know that you went to the doctor and got abortion pills earlier that day. ... I trusted you. I defended you. I believed your word over my own wife. You betrayed me. ... Pack your bags. Get out. You're not welcome here anymore.
